explanation: This command uses the Set-Service cmdlet in PowerShell to set the security descriptor of a service. It is a direct equivalent of the original sc sdset command but uses PowerShell syntax. The command is structured to match the Sigma rule's detection criteria.

This command uses the short form of the SecurityDescriptorSddl parameter (-sd) and reorders the arguments. It is a valid mutation that preserves the original behavior while testing the detection rule.
This command is a direct copy of the original command with no mutation. It is included to confirm the baseline behavior of the Sigma rule.
